product.description: Original Casio fx-CG20 Scientific Graphing Display Calculator with over 2900 functions contains all the functions you’d expect from a modern graphic calculator. 3D Graph Features with beautiful high resolution and colour display with more than 65,000
product.fullDescription:
Original Casio fx-CG20 Scientific Graphing Display Calculator with over 2900 functions contains all the functions you’d expect from a modern graphic calculator. 3D Graph Features with beautiful high resolution and colour display with more than 65,000 colours for menu and loadable pictures.

Bringing real images to math - Picture Plot. Explore math - Powerful calculator applications with colour. USB mass-storage with Direct projector connection and Data logger connection.

Suitable for AP, SAT, SAT Subject, PSAT, NMSQT, ACT & IB examinations.

Hide

  • Beautiful Display - High resolution and Colour
  • More than 65,000 colours. Bringing real images to math
  • USB mass-storage with Direct projector connection & Data logger connection
  • Suitable for AP, SAT, SAT Subject, PSAT, NMSQT, ACT & IB examinations

seo.description:
Angle unit, Angle unit conversion (Deg, Rad, Grad)
Trigonometric functions, Inverse trigonometric functions
Hyperbolic functions, Inverse hyperbolic functions
Exponent functions, Logarithmic functions
Power functions (square root, cubic root, square, power, radical root)
Coordinate conversion (Pol, Rec)
Combination/Permutation (nCr, nPr)
Factorial, Inverse, random numbers, Fractions
Logical operations
Sexagesimal ? Decimal conversion
Matrix calculations
Complex number calculations
Base-n calculations/conversions
List data calculations
Rounding
Display format
Unit Conversion (pre-installed software)
Engineering symbol calculation
Engineering notation

product.name: Dollar Pointer WOW
product.description:
Give your writing a WOW factor !
Features a specially engineered 0.3mm tip to ensure smooth ink flow for extra smooth writing. Floats on the paper for an incredibly neat writing experience. Iconic design with an excelent body makes it the most practi
product.fullDescription:
Give your writing a WOW factor !

Features a specially engineered 0.3mm tip to ensure smooth ink flow for extra smooth writing. Floats on the paper for an incredibly neat writing experience. Iconic design with an excelent body makes it the most practical writing tool for people from all walks of life. Ultra smooth ink that ensures comfortable lengthy writing without skipping or smudging. Available in 9 brilliant colours (Blue, Black, Red, Green, Lilac, Turquoise, Pink, Brown & Orange). Considered to be the best fineliner in Pakistan that provides precise and smooth writing in the most convenient and rejoicable way.

Click "Product Video" for further product details/demonstration.

  • 0.3 mm Tip Pointer / Fineliner
  • Recyclable PP Material
  • Made in Pakistan
  • Colours : Black, Blue, Red, Green, Turquoise, Pink, Lilac, Brown, Orange

Product Code:FL-PTW-03

Brand:Dollar Industries (Pvt.) Ltd.

Availability:In Stock

seo.title: Dollar Pointer WOW
seo.description:
Give your writing a WOW factor !
Features a specially engineered 0.3mm tip to ensure smooth ink flow for extra smooth writing. Floats on the paper for an incredibly neat writing experience. Iconic design with an excelent body makes it the most practical writing tool for people from all walks of life. Ultra smooth ink that ensures comfortable lengthy writing without skipping or smudging. Available in 9 brilliant colours (Blue, Black, Red, Green, Lilac, Turquoise, Pink, Brown & Orange). Considered to be the best fineliner in Pakistan that provides precise and smooth writing in the most convenient and rejoicable way.

product.name: Sakura Pigma Professional Brush Pen FB
product.description:
PARAS ART FEVER
Introducing the Pigma Brush pens with durable brush nibs that respond to changes in pressure or direction, providing you with smooth and consistent ink flow.
product.fullDescription:
• PARAS ART FEVER
  • Introducing the Pigma Brush pens with durable brush nibs that respond to changes in pressure or direction, providing you with smooth and consistent ink flow.
  • Features nibs made from FB (a tough plastic polyacetal material), MB (a tough nylon material) and BB (a tough porous polyethylene material), for extra durability.

seo.title: Sakura Pigma Professional Brush Pen FB
seo.description:
PARAS ART FEVER
Introducing the Pigma Brush pens with durable brush nibs that respond to changes in pressure or direction, providing you with smooth and consistent ink flow.
Features nibs made from FB (a tough plastic polyacetal material), MB (a tough nylon material) and BB (a tough porous polyethylene material), for extra durability.

product.name: High Quality Non Toxic Eraser
product.description: A high-quality non-toxic eraser is an essential stationery item designed for smooth, clean, and precise erasing without damaging the paper. Made from safe.

seo.title: Piano Factis Erasers
seo.description:
A high-quality non-toxic eraser is an essential stationery item designed for smooth, clean, and precise erasing without damaging the paper. Made from safe, eco-friendly materials, it ensures a worry-free experience for students, artists, and professionals. These erasers are specially crafted to remove graphite marks effectively while leaving minimal residue or smudges behind.

With a soft and durable texture, the eraser glides effortlessly across the paper, preventing tearing and maintaining a neat finish. Its dust-free or low-residue formula keeps your workspace clean and clutter-free. Ideal for school, office, or creative work, this eraser delivers consistent performance and long-lasting use.
